Okay, so once you've gone over all the pain, the next part is basically pre-overcoming the obstacles, okay? So the biggest reason that people don't buy or act is because they don't have a reason, right? Or you have not touched upon that before you've gotten to the clothes. So you need to close them on doing something now before you've been asked, okay? So providing urgency as well. So this would go something like, you go ahead and say, okay, great. So give it everything you've told me. If it were possible, I could take you to like actually doing this and like very quickly having the energy that you want, losing the weight that you want so that your kids would, you know, actually have an example of up to and be healthy adults. How long would you want to wait to start today to happen? And sometimes I do ask honestly, like, kind of funny like that. So I'm like, why would you wait to start that? Like that's ridiculous, right? So then get them to tell you how long they would want it to take or how long they would want to wait. And if they say anything besides now, like obviously right now, you give them one extra chance and just kind of make it like a thing like, did you misunderstand me? Because like, why would anybody not want to? And I would say something like, hmm, so if you're saying that I could get you to change your entire life and reach these goals in 12 weeks, you'd be willing to wait and waste eight more months of your life feeling like this and then let them respond. Okay. And if they still say no, then you're going to go ahead and be like, okay, um, well, you know, thank you for your time. But unfortunately, I don't think I can help you if you're not ready to make this change right now. And so that's the important part because that's you beating them out right there. And now if they do, then you're going to go to the next one.
